summary: Implemented StatusBarModel with Init(), Update(), View() for Bubble Tea. Supports 5 modes (Normal, Search, Diagnosis, Dashboard, Error) with responsive truncation at 60/80/100 col thresholds, monitoring indicator (监听:开/关 with green/secondary colors), and language indicator (中/EN at far right). Uses lipgloss styling for bold keys and dim descriptions.
keyDecisions: Used simple hint() helper function instead of hintGroup struct for cleaner rendering
Responsive truncation: priority-1 (>=60 cols), priority-2 (>=80 cols), priority-3 (>=100 cols) matching UI design spec
Monitoring indicator styled with bright green (82) for watching, text-secondary (242) for idle
Language indicator always shown at far right regardless of terminal width
Dashboard mode retains monitoring indicator at >=80 cols per UI design spec
Used lipgloss Color codes directly rather than named constants for ANSI colors

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: statusbar.go implements StatusBarModel with Init(), Update(msg tea.Msg), View() string
States: Normal, Search Active, Diagnosis Active, Dashboard Active, Error
Normal state key hints rendered with nav/search/quit keys
Responsive truncation: priority-1 (>=60 cols), priority-2 (>=80 cols), priority-3 (>=100 cols)
Monitoring indicator: 监听:开 (green) / 监听:关 (text-secondary)
Language indicator: 中 / EN at far right
Mode-specific hints: search mode, diagnosis mode, dashboard mode, error mode
Status bar updates on mode change, monitoring toggle, language switch
